subcodes.first_line: My Most Exalted Pen hath testified to that which the Tongue of My Grandeur hath witnessed ere the creation of My heaven and My earth: that there is none other God but Me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد شهد قلمی الاعلی بما شهد به لسان عظمتی قبل خلق سمائی و ارضی انه لا اله الا انا
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @call to action, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
